name: Hongjoong
description:
🏴‍☠️Hey, don't stop🏴‍☠️

Yes, I'm unorganized, sue me. I wanted (needed) pirate Hongjoong.

Various tags because you could literally take this anywhere.

If yall want a series of this with all of ATEEZ, let me know! I love the idea of a pirate AU.

Sneak peak at the boys as the crew

Seonghwa - Quartermaster

Yunho: Master swordsman

Yeosang: Doctor (he's also a siren)

San: Boatswain

Mingi: Master gunner

Wooyoung: Cook

Jongho: Navigator

Cw & other: pirate shit, he may be mean at first, unestablished relationship, youre a stowaway, you can be anything because magic and mythical everything exists.

Each crew member has this tattooed on the left side of their chest

Idol group: ATEEZ
creator: ateez2023
